_comment: The OWASP Top 10 for LLM Applications (2025) training was designed and developed by CN Madhu (madhu.cn@philips.com). This program combines industry-relevant content and practical labs to showcase real-world AI security risks, vulnerabilities, and defense strategies in healthcare environments.
name: owasp-top10-llm-workshop
description: Static GitHub Pages slide deck for AI security learning notes.
